issues.problem: Inner pages had too much empty space above the first content block and before the footer, which weakened hierarchy and made long pages feel visually unfinished.
issues.impact: Users hit large low-information zones before they reach content or after the last meaningful action.
issues.action_taken: Reduced mobile section padding globally and tightened first/last section rhythm inside main content.

issues.problem: The footer consumed too much vertical space and visually competed with the final CTA or closing message.
issues.impact: End-of-page actions lost urgency because the footer immediately dominated the screen.
issues.action_taken: Compressed footer spacing, reduced top margin, and switched mobile footer navigation to a denser two-column layout where possible.

issues.problem: Hero meta stats were forced into three narrow columns, which reduced scanability and made the first screen feel busy.
issues.impact: The supporting facts under the hero read as noise instead of reinforcing the main message.
issues.action_taken: Changed the mobile meta layout to two columns and let the primary stat span the full row.

issues.problem: The post-content action cluster presented three nearly equal actions, so the intended next step was not obvious enough.
issues.impact: Users interested in continuing could hesitate between path, groups and glossary.
issues.action_taken: Kept two strong actions and demoted the glossary to a tertiary text-link treatment; stacked the CTA group on small screens.

issues.problem: Invalid Astro image props in header/footer caused type-check errors, which blocked reliable verification of visual changes.
issues.impact: Design improvements could not be validated cleanly in CI-style checks.
issues.action_taken: Removed unsupported Image props so astro check can pass without errors.

issues.problem: Each FAQ category opened with a full section-header treatment, which made the page feel like multiple stacked landings instead of one scannable help page.
issues.impact: Users had to fight repeated visual resets before reaching the actual questions.
issues.action_taken: Replaced repeated full section-header blocks with compact folio+kicker category headings and tighter section spacing.

issues.problem: The lineage section could start with the image block before the explanatory text, weakening narrative flow and risking a blank-card impression on slower loads.
issues.impact: The section felt visually unanchored before users understood why the image mattered.
issues.action_taken: Changed mobile ordering so explanatory text leads and the lineage image follows; constrained figure width for a tighter composition.

issues.problem: The map block consumed too much first-screen height relative to the list of actual groups and actions.
issues.impact: Users saw geography before useful attendance details and registration paths.
issues.action_taken: Reduced mobile map height and tightened group CTA stacking for easier scan and action.

issues.problem: Some live screenshots suggest production and current repo are not fully in sync, especially around long-page spacing and content block sequencing.
issues.impact: A few visual anomalies visible on the live URL may persist until the updated repo is deployed.
issues.recommended_next_step: Deploy the current repo revision and re-run screenshot capture for the audited templates before closing the audit.

notes: Build completed successfully with non-blocking hints and a Vite chunk-size warning.
